name: ground_truth_ra5_vuln_scan_scope_ambiguous
description: Ground-truth fixture modeled on the Example System IATT assessment pattern for RA-5 vulnerability scanning. Simulates a scenario where vulnerability scans exist but their boundary scope is questionable — scans cover some hosts but the scan target list doesn't match the current asset inventory. LLM returns Non-Compliant with confidence 0.3, triggering confidence-floor abstain. Tests the abstain gate with a scan-derived finding where boundary attribution is uncertain.

ccis_row.guidance: 001059: The organization remediates legitimate vulnerabilities in accordance with an organizational assessment of risk.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment examines the vulnerability scan results and POA&M to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed remediates legitimate vulnerabilities in accordance with organizational risk assessments.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- Vulnerability scan report (May 2026) — covers 12 hosts but asset inventory lists 19 in-boundary hosts; 7 hosts are unscanned.
- POA&M extract — shows 3 open vulnerability items but none reference the 7 unscanned hosts.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Vulnerability scan report covers only 12 of 19 in-boundary hosts; 7 hosts are missing from the scan scope. POA&M lists 3 open vulnerability items but none reference the unscanned hosts — gap identified between scan scope and the current asset inventory.
